bullet_points: Load the dataset and group by oscillator_id.
Generate and save a "Ground Truth" reference file containing the true b and k values for each oscillator to serve as a consistent baseline.
Perform a baseline validation on noise-free data to confirm the numerical derivative method (Savitzky-Golay + central differences) recovers parameters accurately.
Implement the noise injection and downsampling pipeline for 6 SNR levels and 5 temporal resolutions.
Execute the numerical derivative estimation pipeline across all oscillators and conditions using parallel processing.
Save the resulting parameter estimates and MAPE metrics to a structured file.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Data preparation, ground truth generation, and numerical derivative estimation pipeline.

bullet_points: Implement a Dual Kalman Filter to estimate [x, v, k, b]^T as an online state-space problem.
Run the filter on the same grid of SNR levels and temporal resolutions as the numerical derivative method.
Aggregate the results and calculate MAPE for b and k across all 20 oscillators.
Save the intermediate performance metrics (MAPE values) as a structured data file (e.g., .npy or .csv) for researcher access.

Generate a summary plot comparing the robustness of the Dual Kalman Filter versus the numerical derivative method, including error bars/confidence intervals representing the variance across the 20 oscillators.
Save the final performance matrix and the comparison plot.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Dual Kalman Filter implementation, performance benchmarking, and visualization.

bullet_points: Interpret the performance matrix and plots generated in previous steps.
Define the observability threshold (MAPE > 5%) for both methods.
Explicitly compare the computational efficiency (execution time) of the Dual Kalman Filter versus the numerical derivative method.
Discuss the statistical boundaries where Gaussian noise and temporal sparsity render damping characteristics unrecoverable.
Write the full Results section of the report, synthesizing the findings into a coherent scientific narrative.
sub_tasks.sub_task: Analysis, reporting of observability thresholds, and computational efficiency comparison.
